name: stackra/dunning
purpose: Dunning cycle engine — DunningPlan + DunningRun + DunningEvent aggregates for retry ladders and escalation on failed recurring charges.
capabilities: DunningPlan aggregate (dpl_ prefix) — reusable retry + escalation template
DunningRun aggregate (drn_ prefix) — one per triggered cycle
Retry attempts + escalation ladder + notification steps
when_to_use: A recurring charge fails and the tenant needs a retry ladder plus escalation before cancelling the customer's subscription.
when_not_to_use: For one-shot refund workflows, use stackra/refund. For chargeback disputes, use stackra/chargeback.
